# HarmonyAstroApps
> Indie iOS developer building thoughtful, focused apps for everyday life.

## About
HarmonyAstroApps is a small indie iOS development studio dedicated to crafting focused, purposeful apps that solve real everyday problems without unnecessary complexity. Each app is built with care — prioritizing clean design, useful features, and respect for the user's time and privacy. The philosophy is quality over quantity: fewer apps done well, rather than many apps done poorly.

## Apps

### Voice Calculator: Speak & Add
A hands-free calculator that lets you speak numbers and operations out loud — perfect for cooking, shopping, or any time your hands are busy.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/voice-calculator-speak-add/id6759246770
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/voice-calculator/

### Voice Clock Time Speaker
An accessible clock app that announces the time aloud on demand or on a schedule — useful for visually impaired users or anyone who wants audio time updates.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/voice-clock-time-speaker/id6739522220
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/voice-clock/

### Skymap: Constellation Finder
A stargazing companion that uses your device's sensors to identify constellations, stars, and celestial objects in real time — just point and explore the night sky.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/skymap-constellation-finder/id6741057101
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/skymap/

### Cowboy! Quick Shot
A fast-reflex reaction time game with a classic Wild West theme — draw your pistol faster than your opponent and see how quick your trigger finger really is.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/cowboy-quick-shot/id6747758240
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/cowboy/

### Batchly – Batch Photo Editor
A streamlined batch photo editing app that lets you apply adjustments, filters, and transformations to multiple images at once — saving time on repetitive editing tasks.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/batch-photo-editor-batchly/id6751959442
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/batchly/

### Flight Mode Chat
An offline chat app that works without an internet connection — great for journaling, drafting messages, or simulating conversations when you're off the grid.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/flight-mode-chat/id6749311035
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/flight-mode-chat/

### Learn Kanji – JLPT N5 to N1
A structured kanji learning app covering all JLPT levels from N5 to N1, with stroke order, meanings, readings, and spaced repetition to help you master Japanese characters.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6747757403
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/learn-kanji/

### Hikers View: Peak Spotter AR
An augmented reality app for hikers and outdoor enthusiasts that identifies mountain peaks and summits in your camera view using AR overlays.
- App Store: Coming soon
- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/hikers-view/

## Philosophy
HarmonyAstroApps builds indie iOS apps with a focus on simplicity, accessibility, and user respect. Apps are designed to be focused tools that do one thing well — no bloat, no dark patterns. Where possible, features work offline and without requiring accounts or data collection. Accessibility features like voice output and large text support are first-class considerations, not afterthoughts.

## Contact
- Email: harmonyastroapp@gmail.com

- Website: https://harmonyastroapps.github.io/
